name: vencord-customrpc
description: Control your Vencord CustomRPC Rich Presence directly from Raycast.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

commands.name: stop-rich-presence
commands.title: Stop Rich Presence
commands.description: Stop your current Vencord CustomRPC presence
commands.subtitle: Discord Rich Presence

preferences.name: defaultAppId
preferences.title: Default Application ID
preferences.description: Your Discord application ID from the Developer Portal. Saves you from entering it every time.

title: Vencord CustomRPC
author: just_me
